series_metadata.series_description: These records contain applications including but not limited to: new branches, request for waivers, select employee group applications, and community group applications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after the date of the application, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
